name: Creamed Cranberry Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beans.
2. Soak overnight and cook with kolbasz in a soup kettle along with onion and salt and peppercorns to taste.
3. When the beans and meat are cooked, make the roux: Brown the roux ingredients until brown in color and add 1 cup of water; bring to a boil.
4. Add this to the soup and cook for about 5 minutes until the soup comes back to a boil.
5. Take 1/2 pint of sour cream at room temperature.
6. Mix in 1 tablespoon of flour to thicken.
7. To the sour cream, add hot soup, 1 tablespoon at a time, and mix well until the cream is thinned.
8. Add this to the hot soup (to prevent curdling).
9. Bring back to a gentle boil.
10. Turn off the heat.
